  "message": "Command ran successfully",

DisplayHint Date                   Day DayOfWeek DayOfYear Hour  Kind Millisecond Minute Month
----------- ----                   --- --------- --------- ----  ---- ----------- ------ -----
   DateTime 06-07-2026 12.00.00 AM   6    Monday       187   13 Local         535     59     7


",

  "cmdRunByAi": "powershell -Command "Get-Date | Format-Table -AutoSize""
}

{
  "message": "Command ran successfully",

DriveLetter FriendlyName SizeRemaining         Size
----------- ------------ -------------         ----
          C                89958105088 267385827328
                             120619008    850391040

  "cmdRunByAi": "powershell -Command "Get-Volume | Select-Object DriveLetter, FriendlyName, SizeRemaining, Size | Format-Table -AutoSize""
}
